overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking through a rainy, misty Victorian-era residential district with wet cobblestone streets, horse-drawn carriages, and ornate mansions, eventually entering a landscaped park with massive oak trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet cobblestone intersection in Victorian residential district

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters the intersection from the left
character stops walking and waits on the sidewalk edge
carriage passes by and continues down the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward an intersection, then stopping on the sidewalk to allow a horse-drawn carriage to pass safely before continuing

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large three-story Victorian house with tower and wrap-around porch
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars
tree with pink blossoms visible through the rain
wet reflective cobblestone road surface with puddles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rainy cobblestone intersection lined with Victorian mansions and wrought iron fences. A horse-drawn carriage approaches from the left, prompting the character to stop and wait on the sidewalk until it passes safely.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street lined with Victorian houses and oak trees

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone street past parked carriages and alongside Victorian mansions with large porches

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage parked on the left side of the street

entered.detail: wooden telegraph pole with multiple crossbars and wires
house with prominent front porch and white columns

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the wet residential street, passing a stationary carriage parked on the left. Victorian houses with ornate porches line the street, and wooden utility poles run along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped park garden with central oak tree and benches

events.description: character turns right off the cobblestone street into a tree-lined park area

agents.ego_description: turning off the street and walking along a curved garden path through a landscaped park with large oak trees and flower beds

entered.detail: enormous ancient oak tree with spreading branches and Spanish moss
wooden slatted park bench facing the garden
large decorative stone urn with white lilies
ornate gate marking the entrance to the park

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a tranquil park area, leaving the cobblestone street behind. The scene opens into a landscaped garden dominated by a massive central oak tree, with curved paths, park benches, and decorative flower urns visible through the misty rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy Victorian residential district that gradually transitions into a tranquil, landscaped park. It begins at a wet cobblestone intersection lined with ornate mansions and wrought iron fences, where the character pauses on the sidewalk to let a horse-drawn carriage pass. As the character proceeds down the residential street, the view shifts past a stationary carriage and wooden utility poles under the persistent mist. The scene then opens as the character turns away from the cobblestones and enters a garden area, leaving the urban architecture behind. Finally, the environment expands into a lush park dominated by a massive central oak tree, with curved paths and decorative flower urns visible through the rain.
